track1_object_location.reason: Control-only: no explicit object memory and no fixed object-location query API. A multi-frame VLM control builds no object inventory (labels + 3D positions) at memory-construction time and has no deterministic native object-location query over memory artifacts; the VLM only reads raw sampled frames at query time.

track2_scanrefer.reason: Control-only: no explicit object memory and no referring-expression resolver over object memory.

track3_openeqa.reason: Control-only: any answering happens over raw frames, not exported memory. This is a no-explicit-memory ablation, not a native QA/retrieval fixed API.
